title: MacOS: error configuring network namespace for container on fresh installation
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

Failing to run configure network namespace with freshly installed podman on Mac OS.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. `brew install podman`
2. `podman machine init`
3. `podman machine start`
4. `podman run nginx`


**Describe the results you received:**

```
Resolving "nginx" using unqualified-search registries (/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/999-podman-machine.conf)
Trying to pull docker.io/library/nginx:latest...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:4ce73aa6e9b01ef152efc2cb67320b96ba96878ca897167291449f2bd58594f7
Copying blob sha256:07aded7c29c6011dfdf02fc98e087c941d3c2661c4e73d134c6491e25231d16c
Copying blob sha256:bbe0b7acc89c9d8f880136e22d2243a220895f7a1bfa6113b4e0ebd090e88b81
Copying blob sha256:44ac32b0bba890dcb4f6e51224f2ea6044a506f26edf62d39150927efbda7cc8
Copying blob sha256:91d6e3e593db79f94bb7566733a8253b7bd245cc3ea670f0a349d19fe6960b8a
Copying blob sha256:8700267f2376da8ddf80c62cb5e1f4183d3bdf6840a84aa87120243aff5259e7
Copying blob sha256:8700267f2376da8ddf80c62cb5e1f4183d3bdf6840a84aa87120243aff5259e7

Copying blob sha256:07aded7c29c6011dfdf02fc98e087c941d3c2661c4e73d134c6491e25231d16c
Copying blob sha256:91d6e3e593db79f94bb7566733a8253b7bd245cc3ea670f0a349d19fe6960b8a
Copying blob sha256:44ac32b0bba890dcb4f6e51224f2ea6044a506f26edf62d39150927efbda7cc8
Copying config sha256:f8f4ffc8092c956ddd6a3a64814f36882798065799b8aedeebedf2855af3395b
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
Error: error preparing container d6f07f2ee8d98e192663af4ff751915946fda2751624fd8a993ba87817b8b489 for attach: error configuring network namespace for container d6f07f2ee8d98e192663af4ff751915946fda2751624fd8a993ba87817b8b489: error adding pod upbeat_mendeleev_upbeat_mendeleev to CNI network "podman": unexpected end of JSON input
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

Successfully running the nginx pod.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Client:
Version:      3.4.0
API Version:  3.4.0
Go Version:   go1.17.1
Built:        Thu Sep 30 20:44:31 2021
OS/Arch:      darwin/amd64

Server:
Version:      3.3.1
API Version:  3.3.1
Go Version:   go1.16.6
Built:        Mon Aug 30 22:46:36 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

Not sure what you want here.

```
$ brew search podman
==> Formulae
podman ✔                                  pod2man                                   modman                                    todoman

If you meant "podman" specifically:
It was migrated from homebrew/cask to homebrew/core.
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md)**


Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

Physical.

```
